uq_backup_policy_mail_server.name: uq_backup_policy_mail_server
uq_backup_policy_mail_server.where: "backup_policy"."mail_server_id" IS NOT NULL AND "backup_policy"."deleted_at" IS NULL

uq_project_cloud_workspace_id.name: uq_project_cloud_workspace_id
uq_project_cloud_workspace_id.where: "project"."cloud_workspace_id" IS NOT NULL AND "project"."deleted_at" IS NULL
